en: It's kind of hard to explain.
We learned these coordinates from an anomaly.
ko: 우리는 이상 현상에서 이 좌표를 배웠어요.

en: What sort of anomaly? I hesitate to term it supernatural, but it definitely wasn't scientific.
You're going to have to be specific, Mr. Cooper, right now.
ko: 구체적으로 말씀해 주셔야 합니다, 쿠퍼 씨, 지금 당장요.

en: Um, what sort of gravitational anomaly? What was this? It was gravity.
You know, I'm real happy that you're excited about gravity, bud,
ko: 중력에 흥미를 가져서 정말 기뻐요, 친구,

en: but you're not getting any answers from us until I get assurances. Assurances?
ko: 하지만 제가 보장을 받을 때까지는 답변을 드릴 수 없어요.

en: Yeah, like that we're getting out of here, and I don't mean in the trunk of some car.
ko: 우리가 여기서 나갈 수 있다는 것처럼요,

en: Don't you know who we are, Cooper? No, Professor, I don't.
You're not my father, Professor Brand. We're NASA.
ko: 당신은 제 아버지가 아니에요, 브랜드 교수님.

en: NASA? NASA. The same NASA you flew for.
